HomePage.name: Tenghuy.
HomePage.title: I'm a full stack-developer and UI/UX designer from Phnom Penh, Cambodia.

Package.title: Open Source Packages
Package.sub_title1: Almost every new package arises from client work. When I discover functionality in client projects that is useful for others, I extract it to an open-source package.
Package.sub_title2: Have a look around; we're pretty sure there's something here that will suit your project!

Article.title: Stay curious.
Article.content: Discover stories, thinking, and expertise from writers on any topic.

ContactNav.contact_sub: Hey there! Feel free to reach out. I do my best to respond in a timely manner, but non-urgent messages may take a few extra days. You'll find that I'm quite responsive on Twitter, so if you have a programming-related question, that's a great place to start.
ContactNav.form: Please fix the errors in the form.
ContactNav.name: Your Name
ContactNav.subject: Subject
ContactNav.success_message: ✅ Thank you! Your message has been submitted successfully.

Footer.made_with_love: Made with ❤️, ☕, and Next in Phnom Penh, Cambodia.
